title: The 3 Most Attractively Priced Growth Stocks to Buy Before January
text: The market almost always rewards growth stocks through a higher valuation. These companies usually have strong momentum behind them, and investors tend to be very bullish on their prospects.

title: S&P 500 Stocks With the Most Upside
text: Wall Street analysts forecast these names to deliver the biggest price gains in the S&P 500 over the next 12 months.

title: How to pay less for call options using debit call spreads
text: Most stock call option contracts lose money upon expiration. They expire worthless.

title: Analysts Predict These Will Be Next Year's Top 10 Stocks
text: Want to own the top S&P 500 stock of 2024? It's not going to be Nvidia again — and it won't even be in the top 10, analysts say.

title: 3 Gambling Stocks to Benefit From Holiday Season Splurges
text: November through January are broadly considered to be peak holiday season. These three months are characterized by increased retail spending, travel and tourism, and splurges on luxuries.

title: December Looks Great For Investors Who Own 9 Stocks
text: Investors can only hope stocks do as well in December as they did in November. There are definitely some S&P 500 stocks that glisten.

title: Dallas Mavericks purchase turns LVS stock into a cheaper bet
text: Shares of the casino and hotel operator fell 5% on Wednesday after billionaire Mark Cuban sold his majority stake in the Dallas Mavericks National Basketball Association (NBA) franchise at a $3.5 billion valuation, more than 12-times what he bought the team for in 2000. What does one thing have to do with another?
